channel.title: GitHub BitBake Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of BitBake in GitHub

item.title: OE4T/meta-tegra
item.description: BSP layer for NVIDIA Jetson platforms, based on L4T

item.title: openbmc/openbmc
item.description: OpenBMC Distribution

item.title: mendersoftware/meta-mender
item.description: Yocto Project meta layer for the Mender client

item.title: Freescale/meta-freescale-3rdparty
item.description: OpenEmbedded/Yocto BSP layer for Freescale's ARM based platforms

item.title: nxp-imx/meta-imx
item.description: i.MX Yocto Project i.MX BSP Layer

item.title: nxp-imx-support/meta-nxp-demo-experience
item.description: NXP Demo Experience Yocto Project Layer

item.title: OE4T/meta-tegra-community
item.description: Repository for community-maintained recipes for additional packages for NVIDIA Jetson platforms

item.title: LibertyGlobal/meta-virtualization
item.description: Mirror of http://git.yoctoproject.org/cgit/cgit.cgi/meta-virtualization/

item.title: Freescale/meta-freescale-distro
item.description: OpenEmbedded/Yocto BSP layer for Freescale's ARM based platforms

item.title: mendersoftware/meta-mender-community
item.description: Community supported integration layers for Mender on various boards

item.title: sbabic/meta-swupdate
item.description: Yocto receipes to generate a swupdate rootfilesystem as initrd

item.title: pengutronix/meta-ptx
item.description: Yocto layer for ptx-releated tools and distro

item.title: meta-qt5/meta-qt5
item.description: QT5 layer for openembedded

item.title: kraj/meta-clang
item.description: Clang C/C++ cross compiler and runtime for OpenEmbedded/Yocto Project

item.title: Azure/meta-iotedge
item.description: Yocto layer for Azure IoT Edge

item.title: openembedded/openembedded-core
item.description: The official Git repository is at https://git.openembedded.org/openembedded-core/.

item.title: Freescale/meta-freescale
item.description: Layer containing NXP hardware support metadata

item.title: rauc/meta-rauc
item.description: Yocto/Open Embedded meta layer for RAUC, the embedded Linux update framework

item.title: rust-embedded/meta-rust-bin
item.description: Yocto layer for installing Rust toolchain from pre-built binaries
